source_note: Patterns in public UHC commercial medical-necessity policies and advance-notification lists as of 2025; SIMULATED — not authoritative.

procedures.notes: Advance notification may be required under specific high-volume contracts.

common_denial_reasons: repeat within 60 days without interval clinical change

procedures.description: Catheter placement in coronary arteries with contrast injection(s)
required_documents: Prior non-invasive testing OR ACS documentation
common_denial_reasons: missing prior non-invasive testing in non-ACS case
procedures.notes: PA handled by Optum clinical-review vendor; weekday morning submissions clear faster.

common_denial_reasons: no failure of medical management documented
extended monitoring (>14d MCT) billed under wrong code
procedures.notes: Mobile cardiac telemetry under separate codes requires PA.
